case_title: SOUTH BEACH MARINA APARTMENTS LTD., A CA PARTNERSH vs. WILLIAMS, CARREN KIRKLAND et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOUTH BEACH MARINA APARTMENTS LTD., A CA PARTNERSH AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MARGO
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED HEREIN AS DOES 1 TO 10 TO BE WILLIAMS, MARGO
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

SOUTH BEACH MARINA APTS. MICHAEL ROSSOFF, ESQ. SBMA LTD. A CALIF. LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. CARREN KIRKLAND WILLIAMS IN PRO PER 9:37 A.M. C/C COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT CARREN KIRKLAND WILLIAMS. PRIMA FACIE CASE PRESENTED BY PLAINTIFFS. PLTFS. WITNESS, BARBARA KANE, SWORN AND EXAMINED. EXHIBIT #1, ORIGINAL LEASE, I.D. AND EVID. EXHIBIT #2, THREE DAY NOTICE TO PAY RENT OR QUIT, I.D. AND EVID. 9:45 A.M. THE COURT AFTER HEARING THE TESTIMONY AND REVIEWING THE EVIDENCE ORDERED JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT CARREN KIRKLAND WILLIAMS AND MARGO WILLIAMS FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 2 TOWNSEND STREET #1-105. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED ADJUDGED AND DECREED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM CARREN KIRKLAND WILLIAMS ONLY $3,314.91 RENTS AND DAMAGES, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, AND NO COST. FURTHER THE AGREEMENT UNDER WHICH THE DEFENDANT HOLDS POSSESSION BE FORFEITED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, CARREN KIRKLAND WILLIAMS, MARGO IT IS HEREBY ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED THAT: PLAINTIFF SOUTH BEACH MARINA APARTMENTS SHALL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANTS CARREN KIRKLAND WILLIAMS AND MARGO WILLIAMS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSON OF 2 TOWNSEND STREET 1-105. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED ADJUDGED AND DECREED THAT PLAINTIFF PLAINTIFF SOUTH BEACH MARINA APARTMENTS HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARREN KIRKLAND WILLIAMS, ONLY: $3,314.91 RENTS AND PER DIEM DAMAGES; $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, AND COST WAIVED. TOTAL JUDGMENT (MONEY) AS TO CARREN KIRKLAND WILLIAMS IS $3,974.91 FURTHER THE AGREEMENT UNDER WHICH THE DEFENDANTS HOLD POSSESSION OF SAID PREMISE, BE AND THE SAME IS DECLARED FORFEITED, VOID, AND OF NO EFFECT.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, CARREN KIRKLAND WILLIAMS, MARGO
